headline: IBM Announces Red Hat AI Inference and Red Hat OpenShift Virtualization Service on IBM Cloud
summary: IBM (NYSE: IBM) today announced two new managed services – Red Hat AI Inference on IBM Cloud and Red Hat OpenShift Virtualization Service on IBM Cloud – to help enterprises accelerate AI adoption and run security-forward, scalable and predictable virtualization environments.
